acceptance_criteria: Choose exactly ONE approach (preferred: replace every player.attackStrengthTicker = 100 with player.resetAttackStrengthTicker(); alternative: add accesswidener + loom config + fabric.mod.json entry) and apply consistently to every call site in CombatHooksGametest.kt

If using widener path: src/main/resources/dndweapons.accesswidener contains exactly 'accessWidener v2 named' followed by 'accessible field net/minecraft/world/entity/player/Player attackStrengthTicker I'; build.gradle.kts loom {} block sets accessWidenerPath = file("src/main/resources/dndweapons.accesswidener"); fabric.mod.json has top-level "accessWidener": "dndweapons.accesswidener"
./gradlew chiseledBuild completes without IllegalAccessError or visibility compilation errors on all 5 MC versions

All 6 single-hit combat gametests (finesseSprintBonusFires, lightDualWieldBonusFires, versatileEmptyOffhandFires, lanceOnFootHalves, lanceMountedFullDamage, vanillaIronSwordCarriesFinesseHook) remain passing

agents.task_title: Rewrite sweep gametest to use FINESSE weapon and safe secondary spawn position
acceptance_criteria: Replace the greataxe in the sweep test with a FINESSE weapon (e.g. dndItem("rapier") or dndItem("scimitar"))
Set player.isSprinting = true before the attack so the FINESSE sprint bonus (1.20x multiplier) applies
Update the primary damage assertion to |primaryDealt - base * 1.20f| <= 0.5f
Spawn the secondary pig at a fractional coordinate within 0.5 blocks of the primary (e.g. Vec3(2.0, 1.0, 1.5)) so it is safely inside sweep range on all 5 MC versions
Secondary assertion remains secondaryDealt > 0 && secondaryDealt < primaryDealt - tol

Update the KDoc comment at the top of the sweep test function: remove any wording that implies HEAVY contributes a damage multiplier; clarify the test validates the strike-once guard by demonstrating secondary < primary
Sweep test passes on all 5 MC versions in ./gradlew chiseledRunGametest
No other combat gametests are regressed
